checks.statement: P_perp^2 = P_perp for P_perp = I - P_K.
K_formal remains one lepton, one up, one down protected state.
The coordinate-first block (0,1,2) is not used.

open_obligations: prove full operator block invariance or controlled off-block coupling
checks.statement: D_FK maps K_formal and H_perp into controlled blocks.

open_obligations: prove nested finite projectors converge to the coordinate-free formal projector
checks.statement: finite formal-kernel projectors converge strongly to P_K.

limitations: Projection algebra is clean for the finite-rank formal kernel.
Full operator invariance and finite-projector convergence remain conditional.
title: BHSM v1.8 Formal Complement Stability Report
